value:
I'm sorry you've had this frustrating experience. It sounds like you touched in at Elephant & Castle rail but exited without proper barriers, then touched in again at Paddington Tube—and you've been charged the maximum fare for what should have been a single journey.

To help get this sorted, could you let me know the date and time this happened? Once I have those details, I can review your journey and arrange a refund for the overcharge.
